programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On May 19, 1992, Mary Jo Buttafuoco's life changed forever. Shot point blank in the head by her husband's teenage lover.

programme.desc: A mysterious kingpin emerges from the shadows of the dark net, willing to stop at nothing to protect his multibillion-dollar online empire, the Silk Road. What will it take to find this man?

programme.desc: Four men flying over a remote African escarpment crash, leaving three of them seriously injured.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: While hiking solo, a former soldier is hit by a series of avalanches and shatters his hip and femur. He must drag himself to safety.

programme.desc: Aspiring actress Vicki Morgan is bludgeoned to death with a baseball bat by her roommate. After he confesses to the cops, it seems like an open and shut case. But things quickly take a turn.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S3 Ep. 11

programme.title: Who The Bleep Did I Marry? S1 Ep. 2

programme.desc: Each week four special guests step through a door into a scene where everyone has a script - except them! Comic chaos featuring some of the funniest performers from Australia and overseas. Hosted by Shane Bourne and judged by Tom Gleisner.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Each week four special guests step through a door into a scene where everyone has a script - except them! Comic chaos featuring some of the funniest performers from Australia and overseas. Hosted by Shane Bourne and Judged by Tom Gleisner.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When ditzy cheerleader Brittany invites Daria to a party with the popular kids, Quinn reveals that she'll also be attending the party.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A New York Department of Integration social worker helps supernatural creatures adapt to city life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy, on a 36 year mission in space, go crazy from boredom. Penniless and hungry, Ren and Stimpy seek work as mice catchers - with Ren as the bait.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Captain Hero attempts to pledge a new neighborhood Greek family, and Ling Ling's dad moves in.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero must become cool in order to save the world, and Toot and Ling-Ling take up cockfighting.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The surviving roommates return home to cast a new roommate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Stimpy becomes overly superstitious. He continues to live by his superstitions and Ren keeps disbelieving. Ren and Stimpy travel to a new country and take the viewer along.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jane and Daria team up for an art contest depicting their idea of student life at the dawn of the millennium, but their negative approach doesn't sit well with everyone.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The students of Lawndale High take a paint-balling field trip, and Daria and Quinn are in for a surprise when their parents sign up as chaperones.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren is suffering from allergies. Little does he know that he may be allergic to his best pal. Ren and Stimpy leave the country when it rains and their fields are ruined with fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: Daria has mixed feelings when she applies for a scholarship sponsored by a company known for unethical business practices, and Jane resents the scholarship process.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: A teachers' strike at Lawndale High results in Daria instructing Quinn's English class, and teachers turn to Trent and Jane for artistic advice.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Councilman Fitzpatrick sells his soul to Twayne, and Callie considers a cushy job in Hell.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy pass through a black hole and mutate in their strange surroundings. Stimpy invents a happy helmet that pushes the naturally angry Ren past the happy limit into madness.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy go to the Natural History Museum to see the skeletal remains of the mammoth Stimpysaurus. Wilbur Cobb tells them about the evolution of the great beast.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 513
programme.desc: The delivery of the family's new refrigerator stirs up repressed childhood memories for Daria and leads to a much-needed talk with her parents.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Foxxy challenges the Board of Education, and Spanky and Xandir embark on a sham marriage for insurance.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: Daria feels apprehensive about inviting Tom to a dinner with her parents, and Quinn has unrealistic expectations when she decides she wants a steady boyfriend.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Captain Hero commits to a special needs giant, and Clara goes Munchausen-by-proxy with Wooldoor.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Randall joins a zombie cult, and Mark performs psychiatric evaluations on his coworkers.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The roommates help Xandir prepare to come out to his parents, with role-playing exercises.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Mark helps an old tree get its groove back, and Randall loses his favorite non-vital organ.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: As Lawndale High prepares for the annual teachers versus classic rock DJs hockey game, Daria and Quinn must miss the festivities since they're both been grounded.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Mrs. Bennett takes her economics class to Mall of the Millennium on a field trip, Daria finds Quinn and the Fashion Club playing hooky.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The housemates appease the spirits of dead Native Americans. Clara seeks her daddy's approval.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Becker arrives at the diner on Valentine’s Day, he is displeased to find wall-to-wall make-out sessions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 14

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is upset when he learns that his ex-wife has written a pop-psychology book starring him as "Angry Man."

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 16

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 17

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: John has an unusual run of good luck...and he doesn't trust it.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Open Windows

programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run

programme.title: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy trades in her uniform for something more risqué when she goes undercover as a prostitute.

programme.desc: During a home invasion, Andy is left alone and confronted with a hiding thief who is armed and very volatile.

programme.desc: Amy and Jack train Blue for a competition. Lisa deals with a difficult loss. Katie secretly buys a dirt bike.

programme.desc: After Jack makes a major announcement, Lou plans a party and forces Jack into an awkward reunion.

programme.desc: When a client horse keeps escaping, Amy discovers the animal has unexpected abilities.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 5

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 25

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 7

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: This episode takes place four months after Mark was convicted of murder. Steve is slowly recovering from his wounds and Mark is still rotting in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A hospital emergency preparedness drill turns deadly when an unpopular and ambitious nurse is found dead amid the chaos with an eccentric artist the only witness.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 21
programme.desc: In a grungy Fitzroy warehouse, contestants lift the lids on their mystery boxes, leading to coffee beans spilling out across their bench as judges reveal they must create a dish that features coffee.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Arriving at Alla Wolf- Tasker's Lake House restaurant, contestants must recreate his summer cucumbers with Murray cod dish. The contestant whose dish least resembles Alla's will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Teams need to create the prefect date night meal including an entrÃ©e, main and dessert for 25 couples plus the judges. The two teams with the least impressive menu will head to a shock elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The bottom two teams from yesterday's challenge face elimination and must split their 90 minute cooking time over two rounds, with the creator of the least impressive second round dish going home. Plus, Masterclass #2

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 25
programme.desc: It's time to switch things up, and everyone is now cooking for themselves to stay in the competition. The maker of today's best dish will win a cash prize of $10,000 and a game-changing immunity pin.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Today's mystery box has been set by the Queen of the kitchen, the legendary Maggie Beer. The four least impressive dishes created from the mystery box will send their makers into a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Fish butcher extraordinaire Josh Niland reveals his first pressure test dish, tuna wellington with mashed potato and tuna gravy. Whoever cooks the dish that is least like Josh's will be sent home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Teams face a service challenge for 60 hungry diners at the stately Werribee Mansion. To win a shot at immunity, contestants must turn humble ingredients into a fine dining entrÃ©e and posh main course.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Contestants vie for immunity from Sunday's elimination over a 2-round fry up, and must create the best dishes using an everyday air fryer, before cooking a sweet or savoury dish using a deep fryer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Competitors must identify a selection of leafy greens and herbs. The first six contestants to incorrectly name the produce must create their tastiest dish that celebrates greens to avoid elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Andy opens today's mystery box to reveal a mini stormcloud as lightning flashes around the kitchen. Contestants must create a dish for a rainy day, with a fast track to the immunity challenge at stake

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Gelato master Donny Toce presents his intricate dessert, Honey, comprising a honey tuille, gelato honeycomb, and blown sugar beehive for tonight's Pressure Test, and failure will send someone home!

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Contestants become artists today for a creative service challenge, and the judges expect three-course masterpieces as they take inspiration from a virtual forest at digital art gallery, The LUME.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 34
programme.desc: An imposing figure appears in the kitchen - it's iconic chef Marco Pierre White, and contestants face a pressure test to win immunity by recreating his panache of sea scallops, calamari and ink sauce. Plus, Masterclass #3

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish using ingredients from culinary king Marco Pierre White's array of pantry items that he uses at home. The least impressive dish will ensure elimination for its maker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Contestants enter the MasterChef kitchen for a smoking mystery box challenge. They must create a dish that incorporates a burnt element or has the flavour of fire, for a shot at a huge advantage.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 37
programme.desc: It's an elimination pressure test with a difference, The contestants won't see or taste the dish, and they won't be given a recipe. All they have to go on is a review written by judge Melissa Leong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Vying for a shot at immunity, contestants are split into two teams for a service challenge. Each team must curate a three-course menu for either the Japanese or Italian restaurant they are cooking in.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 39
programme.desc: You have a ticket to the silver screen for a movie food immunity challenge. After a popcorn taste test, the remaining competitors must create a blockbuster flavour chop top that will thrill filmgoers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Tonight, someone will be eliminated and miss out on the Top 10 as contestants attempt to create an entrancing dish that transports the judges and legendary guest chef Rick Stein to a special place.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S14 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Top 10 Week kicks off with one tough mystery box â€“ it's the everything box, and all ingredients inside must be used. Plus, anyone who cooks a top dish this week will be safe from Sunday's elimination.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The perfect storm is brewing in Samoa as the tribes fight to protect supplies & maintain fire in adverse conditions. However, how will the prospect of a idol at play tamper with new friendships?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As a major alliance crumbles, one tribe scrambles to avoid elimination. The other tribe grows frustrated with two members and make moves to have them removed next.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Food is the only thing on the minds of the castaways as one member from each camp faces a painful moral dilemma which could have dramatic ramifications for the tribemates & their own game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the castaways endure further wind & rain without fire & shelter before a lengthy immunity challenge finishing with the next Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Blatant lies at the last tribal council has put everyone in one camp on edge. Will they be able to put their differences aside to win the reward challenge or will they leave hungry?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A brutal tribal council the night before has left one castaway on the war path seeking retribution. At the immunity challenge the tribes must take part in a physical Sumo'an contest.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: As both tribes appear to reach their wits' end, the prospect of a luxurious and cleansing reward could be enough to keep the castaways in the game for weeks to come.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Winning immunity has never been so vital to resettling the balance within each tribe, and with a highly competitive challenge that encourages fair contact, things are sure to get feisty.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Social divisions begin to exhaust castaways as one tribe breaks down ahead of the next immunity challenge. Will they be able to come together to avoid another visit to tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Aligned castaways find themselves at each other's throats over who is doing enough work around camp, but is one player acting lazy to divide the tribe?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A surprise challenge sees one castaway return to camp with an unexpected power that could push tensions to breaking point. Later, will one castaway past come back to haunt them at tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Alliances continue to flip as a former power player finds themselves at the bottom of their tribe and a last minute scramble to return to their former glory will turn friend against friend.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Betrayal runs rampant within both tribes as deceptive immunity clues and relentless strategising begins to place targets on the backs of castaways who had previously flown under the radar.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The fallout from one of the most dramatic Tribal Councils this season sends shockwaves through one tribe as castaways scramble to repair broken bonds.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Change is in the air as time comes for the biggest event in the game so far, a merger. Emotions continue to run high when a particularly difficult reward challenge offers a deeply sentimental prize.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The fallout from the first group Tribal Council tears a rift between the newly formed tribe, resulting in a huge clash of alliances. Who will be the next contestant to have their flame extinguished?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A shock display of power at the last Tribal Council places an immediate target on one castaway. Will the new shift in camp dynamics be enough to remove a prolific player from the game?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A scheming conversation is overheard putting one contestant in the firing line and an alliance is shattered resulting in one of the most divided Tribal Councils this series.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Another alliance is in jeopardy as one contestant decides to flip on a fellow tribesman, planning the biggest blindside this season, but an unexpected turn of events forces the castaway to reconsider.
