programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie and Marily are rivals in the small town of Meadow Ridge, their bakeries across the street from each other. Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.title: Love Is A Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie's a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: When Rose returns home to inherit her grandmother’s dress shop, she runs into her high school crush, Cole. They soon realize that just like the shop, their love deserves a second chance as well.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Confidence
programme.desc: Jake Vig is a consummate grifter about to pull his biggest con yet, one set to avenge his friend's murder.

programme.title: Dead Heat
programme.desc: A Boston cop's half-brother convinces him to go halves on a racehorse, but the deal ends them in hot water.

programme.title: The Promise
programme.desc: An Armenian man struggles to keep his family and loved ones safe from genocide by the Turkish army during WWI.

programme.title: Welcome Home
programme.desc: A novelist returns home from vacation to find a homeless woman and her children squatting in his home.

programme.title: A Better Life
programme.desc: A gardener in East L.A. struggles to keep his son away from gangs and immigration agents.

programme.title: Grace Is Gone
programme.desc: After learning that his wife has been killed in Iraq, a man takes his two daughters on a roadtrip to Florida.

programme.title: Chasing Mavericks
programme.desc: Hearing that the Mavericks surf break is real, a teen asks a local legend to teach him how to ride the wave.

programme.title: Draft Day
programme.desc: With the NFL draft approaching, the Browns GM faces tough decisions and a complicated personal life.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: During the 1967 Detroit riots, a group of rogue police officers respond to a complaint with retribution.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: When his brother goes missing, Tommy, the family's black-sheep, cares for his sister-in-law and nieces.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Leah and Zac try building a treehouse but find themselves in over their heads. Leah asks her genies for a treehouse and is thrown for a loop when Shimmer and Shine turn her house into a house of trees!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It’s Halloween in Axle City, and Blaze, AJ, and all of their friends are excited to “Truck or Treat.” But when Crusher tries to steal all of their candy, his plan goes awry, and he sends their treats far, far away from Axle City.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah and her genies are trapped in a cave, it's up to their friends Zac and Kaz to save the day. When the girls bake magical flying cookies, Zeta and Nazboo sneak into their palace to steal the flying flour.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Leah notices Zac the Magician's magic tricks aren't going well, so she calls on her genies for some real magic assistance. But Shimmer and Shine aren't getting the tricks right either, and the girls have a magical mess to fix!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When the Great Animal Crown is lost at the bottom of the ocean, Blaze transforms into a super-fast shark to retrieve it for his Animal Island friends. But he’ll have to swim fast – or Crusher may get to the crown first.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are at the beach when they find a little lost mermaid who needs to get back to her mommy at Mermaid Cove. Together the 3 set off on an underwater adventure!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are heading to the Bike Shop to pick up Boots' very first bike today.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A light thief (Melissa Rauch) is on the loose, leaving all of Axle City in the dark! Gabby outfits Blaze with special lights to help him track down the light thief and restore the missing lights.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are excited to watch their favorite movie, but Leah's popcorn burns and the movie won't play. Leah asks Shimmer and Shine for some movie magic help, but they accidentally wish the movie to life!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It’s race day, and Crusher is cheating twice as hard to beat Blaze and Watts - sending both drivers far, far away! But Blaze and Watts are determined to save AJ and Gabby and get back to the race in time to win!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Shimmer and Zahrora accidentally cause some trouble when they visit a new part of Zahramay Skies called Zahraconia. The girls meet Shaya's twin brother Shaun and help them when their magic combines to form a powerful Lightning Burst Cloud.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Zeta traps the girls in a magic bubble, Tala, Nahal and Parisa team up with the girls' Zahracorns to free them. Shimmer, Shine and Leah meet Rubi, a Rainbow Genie-In-Training, whose rainbows quickly get out of control.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take a rainbow butterfly, Mariposa, to the Butterfly Ball where everybody gets to have wings.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Zeta accidentally transports Tala the monkey to her lair, the girls set out to rescue her. The girls meet a real life ice genie! But when Zeta steals her ice gem necklace, it's up to the girls to stop her.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Join Dora for a Father's Day adventure! When the Little Kite she makes for Papi gets blown away in the wind, she'll need your help before she goes out over the ocean!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Crusher’s Grammy is in town to watch Crusher and Blaze race at the Monster Dome. But when Crusher tries to cheat using rocket skis, his plan backfires, blasting him off the racetrack and across Axle City! Part 1

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Leah has invited Shimmer and Shine over for a sleepover party, where they'll eat pizza, dance all night, and sleep in a pillow fort! But when all the party plans go awry, the genies help Leah out with some wish granting.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: An enchanted treasure map leads Shimmer, Shine, Leah, and their Dragon Rider friend Farnaz to the powerful Dragon Gem. But when Zeta gets ahold of the gem, it's up to Farnaz and the girls to get it back before Zeta becomes too powerful to stop.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: Boots really wants to give his mommy a picture of himself for her birthday, but he's having a really bad hair day! Dora and Boots set out on a Hairy Quest: Boots is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Nazboo's siblings come to visit, Zeta recruits them to help take the girls' gems when they're not home. / When Zac wishes himself into the forest to find a mythical creature, Kaz and the girls adventure to find him.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When flight magic disappears from Zahramay Skies, Rubi and the girls try to set things right, using rainbows to get around. When Zeta combines Daydream Dust with Dream Come True Dust, genies' daydreams start coming true and wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta uses a magical gem to shrink everything in Zahramay Falls, including Leah, Shimmer, and Shine! Leah, Zac, Zeta, and the genies compete in the most fun sport in Zahramay Falls: Zoomicorn Toss.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Zeta traps the girls in an ancient temple where they must work together to escape. Zac, Kaz, and the girls explore a mysterious tower and find a necklace that can turn you into a monster.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! But when Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to finish the race. Part 1

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora and Boots discover Pincel, a cute little paintbrush who's lost and really wants to get back to Painter Daniella at the Art Studio.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Zeta's upset when Nazboo abandons her on their special day, unaware that it's because he's planning a surprise party for her! When Nazboo loses one of his baby teeth, Zeta schemes to get a powerful present out of it from the Tooth Flitter.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Crusher builds a super-powered vacuum to clean up his big mess – but the machine goes haywire, sucking up Crusher and everything in its path! Now Pickle must team up with Blaze and AJ to stop the vacuum and save Crusher.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah go to a new place called Zahramay Oceanea to help train a young genie-in-training named Arabella. But when Zeta shows up and tries to take over Oceanea, it's up to the girls and their new friend to stop her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The girls celebrate Cuddle Buddy Day by helping the Animal Genie deliver pets. But when Zeta uses a spell to make everything dark, the Animal Genie must team up with the Glitter Genie to make the pets glow so they can see.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora takes a Magic Cape back to the Prince's Castle so she can break the spell that turned the Prince into a lion.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dora and Diego in the Time of Dinosaurs: Dora and Diego travel back to prehistoric times and go on a dinosaur adventure to find Baby Jaguar and bring him home to his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Dora, Boots and Diego set out to rescue their bunny, turtle and butterfly animalito friends and bring them back home to their Copal Tree.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Stripes loves his jungle horn, a special instrument that can summon all the animals in the jungle. But when a jealous Crusher steals it, Blaze and Stripes must speed after him in a wild chase to get it back.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Dora and Isa have been learning how the Earth's natural energy can power things we use every day. So they've made a volcano for the Science Fair!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine discover a magical gem that makes two of everything, including Zeta! Zac wishes for a pet Ziffilon for Kaz, which turns out to be more trouble and fun than they were expecting.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are going on vacation with Diego and Baby Jaguar at the Rainforest Campground. They're packing everything they need, especially Baby Jaguar's favorite, the Dora Snacks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dora's Rainforest Talent Show: It's time for the Rainforest Talent Show, but first Dora and Boots have to rescue Benny so he can tell his jokes in the show.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The girls join Zora, the Pirate Genie, on an adventure to find a magical Rainbow Pearl to power her ship. / Zeta takes a crystal with random wishes inside it and uses her magic to make it grant the wishes for her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls meet a genie with the power to change hairstyles, but Zeta's determined to take the power for herself. / The girls travel to a magic garden, where they meet a Flitter Genie and shrink down to her size to explore.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Trick or Treasure: The girls visit Nila the mermaid for an underwater treasure hunt. Easy as Pie: Zeta uses a potion to make Zac do everything she says. Can Kaz and the girls stop Zeta before it's too late?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Zeta traps Samira in a magical cave, the girls seek the help of Samira's mentor. The girls accidentally create a fun, sticky glob of candy who's curious about everything.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When the girls bake a cake with bouncing flour, it bounces off and they must catch it in time for Roya's Feather Day party! A potion spill turns Rocket's barks magical. But when the magic gets out of control, the kids must find a way to stop it.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta and Zac get trapped inside a magic bottle and must find a way out before all their friends get sucked inside too! Zeta tries to stop the kids from finding her secret lair when she sees them hunting for gems in the area.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Dora and Boots hop on Pegaso, the flying horse constellation, for a high-flying adventure to bring home his constellation friends to the Moon before the Sun rises!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Baby Bongo on a musical adventure as they race to the Big Music Show in time for Baby Bongo's first performance.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby join Pegwheel the Pirate-Truck for an island treasure hunt! Following their treasure map, the friends search jungle beaches and mountains to find where X marks the spot.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dora's Royal Rescue: Dora and Boots and the noble horse, Rocinante, are off to Story Castle to rescue Don Quixote from the evil wizard, Malambruno.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The girls are in for some fun and adventure when a pirate genie accidentally lands on their doorstep.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze, Stripes, and AJ are racing through the jungle when Stripes discovers a lost little fire beetle named Sparky. Blaze and his friends set off across the jungle to help Sparky get back home to the top of a red hot volcano.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 619
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights when suddenly they hear a cry for help. It's a princess who's calling us from the Royal Garden! It turns out that it's not the princess that needs saving – her kitty's stuck in a tree!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Zeta steals Samira's necklace, they must get it back before she figures out its special power./ When Zeta steals Samira's staff and turns everyone into chickens, Shimmer, Shine, and Leah must stop her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls visit the carpet vendor to fix their carpet, while Zeta and Nazboo plan to take some magic thread. / Zeta and Nazboo tell the girls the fun story of how they first met, but their facts don't quite match up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Sandy takes on SpongeBob in a non-stop week of extreme sports in "Prehibernation Week", then in "Life of Crime", SpongeBob and Patrick borrow a balloon and end up on the run.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Christmas Special: Join the President of the SpongeBob SquarePants Fan Club, Patchy The Pirate and the gang to find out why there's nothing better than Christmas in Bikini Bottom!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick visit Sandy while she's hibernating in 'Survival of the Idiots', and then in 'Dumped', Gary the snail seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Mrs Puff will do anything to make sure that SpongeBob passes his driving test in 'No Free Rides', and in 'I'm Your Biggest Fanatic', SpongeBob finds out his hero isn't so great.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Some undersea superheroes are back in 'Mermaid Man & Barnacle Boy 4', and then in 'Squirrel Jokes', SpongeBob's derogatory comedy is not at all funny to Sandy Squirrel.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 32
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes on Sandy in a series of extreme activities in 'Pressure', and then in 'The Smoking Peanut', SpongeBob tries to hide what he did to an oyster at the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 33
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become slaves on The Flying Dutchman's ship in 'Shanghaied', and then in 'Gary Takes A Bath', SpongeBob's pet snail Gary takes a bath. (Well, what did you expect?)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Mr Krabs loses SpongeBob to Plankton in a game of cards in 'Welcome to the Chum Bucket', and then in 'Frankendoodle', SpongeBob gets into a fight with a doodle of himself!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 35
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't stand it when Patrick won't tell what's in his box, in 'The Secret Box', and then in 'Band Geeks', Squidward, SpongeBob and the gang form their own marching band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 36
programme.desc: SpongeBob believes that the Krusty Krab is haunted in 'The Graveyard Shift', and then in 'Krusty Love', Mr Krabs falls totally in love with Mrs Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 37
programme.desc: SpongeBob must write an essay before the next morning, but gets distracted in 'Procrastination', and then in 'I'm With Stupid', SpongeBob acts stupid to make Patrick look smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 38
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn a really bad word, and start using it everywhere (yipes!) in 'Sailor Mouth', and then in 'Artist Unknown', Squidward tries to teach SpongeBob about art.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 39
programme.desc: SpongeBob must catch some jellyfish for the Krusty Krab in 'Jellyfish Hunter', and then in 'The Fry Cook Games', SpongeBob is entered in the Fry Cook Olympics.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S2 Ep. 40
programme.desc: A large worm is terrorising Bikini Bottom in 'Sandy, SpongeBob, And The Worm', while in 'Squid On Strike', Squidward and SpongeBob go on strike from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 41
programme.desc: The Algae's Always Greener/Spongeguard On Duty: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. When Larry the Lobster is short one man for lifeguard duty, SpongeBob Volunteers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Club Spongebob/My Pretty Seahorse: Spongebob and Patrick build a small clubhouse in a tree - when Squidward wants to join their club, he literally doesn't "fit" in. SpongeBob finds a stray sea horse and adopts it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 43
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants: The new bully in school, Flats, threatens to beat SpongeBob up after school. SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the fact that Squidward has never actually tried a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 44
programme.desc: The Nasty Patty/The Idiot Box: Mr. Krabs has to whip the Krusty Krab into shape in order to pass a health inspection. When Spongebob and Patrick get a large screen TV, they throw out the TV and keep the box.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 45
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy IV/Doing Time: Spongebob gets a hold of Mermaid Man's utility belt and accidentally shrinks all of Bikini Bottom. Ms. Puff takes the blame for an accident Spongebob caused and goes to prison.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: The Snowball Effect/One Krab's Trash: It's snowing! Spongebob and Patrick try to show Squidward how much fun it can be to play in the snow. Mr. Krabs has a garage sale and sells Spongebob the most valuable of items.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 47
programme.desc: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob makes a one-second cameo in a Krusty Krabs commercial. Fed up with Mr. Krabs insults, Squidward quits his job - but has a hard time finding a new job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 48
programme.desc: No Weenies Allowed/Squilliam Returns: Spongebob has to prove that he's tough so he can get into the Salty Spitoon. Squidward's archnemesis, Squilliam, returns to harass Squidward on his failed life since high school.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Krab Borg!/Rock A Bi-Valve: After watching a movie where robots take over the world, Spongebob thinks Mr. Krabs is a robot. Spongebob and Patrick find a baby clam and decide to raise it as their own

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Wet Painters/Krusty Krab Training Video: Spongebob and Patrick must paint Mr. Krabs living room without getting a drop of paint on anything but the walls. Learn how to become a Krusty Krab employee in this episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Spongebob decides to throw a big party after discovering a "how to throw a party" kit in the grocery store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 52
programme.desc: To make some extra cash, Spongebob and Patrick decide to sell chocolate door to door./Barnacle Boy wants to be called "Barnacle Man" and rebels when everyone rejects his request.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 53
programme.desc: Patrick joins Ms. Puff's class but begins to get Spongebob in a lot of trouble causing him to lose gold stars./Mr. Krabs takes Spongebob and Squidward on a clam fishing trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: It is prehistoric Bikini Bottom, and we spend a day in the life of SpongeGar, Patar, and Squog. (Spongebob, Patrick, and Squidward's prehistoric alter-egos.)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 56
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty that he refused to throw away./SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs aims to squeeze every penny out of kids on summer break by building a playground in the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob and Patrick lure Squidward to their backyard campout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Spongebob desperately searches for his missing name tag./Plankton enlists his relatives to help him steal the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: SpongeBob is jellyfishing when he wistfully realizes that he wants to fly./Patchy the Pirate is set to present a never before seen episode of Spongebob with one problem - no tape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 60
programme.desc: SpongeBob catches someone littering and turns him in - but it's the Tattletale Strangler!/SpongeBob and Patrick invest in some magic "invisible spray" at the local prank shop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 61
programme.desc: With the Krusty Krab's new "open 24 hours" policy, the employees must work 'round the clock./Mr. Krabs loses his shell right before a big reunion with his old buddies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Plankton slips and falls on some water at the Krusty Krab and sues Mr. Krabs for not posting a wet floor sign./Spongebob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress to help him sleep better.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: While trying to beat a world record, SpongeBob forgets to feed Gary - for several weeks. So Gary runs away to downtown Bikini Bottom where he is taken in by a kind old woman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 64

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: SpongeBob sets out to make his own Mermaid Man movie using the original actors, fresh from the retirement home./Mr. Krabs is horrified to learn Plankton is dating his mother!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Patrick gets hit in the head and comes to with superior intellect!/Sandy accidentally melds Spongebob and Squidward into one body when her teleportation device malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 69
programme.desc: In another one of his money-making schemes, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into an upscale hotel./Mrs. Puff gets fired when the higher-ups learn of Spongebob's repeated failure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 70

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Spongebob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip to be replaced by Le Spatula./Mr. Krabs sends Spongebob down a wishing well to collect the coins dropped in by people making wishes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 74

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: When Squidward swallows his clarinet reed Sandy offers to retrieve the piece./A misunderstanding over an advertisement causes Patrick to think he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 76
programme.desc: After a bike accident, Squidward is coated in so much mud that the residents of Bikini Bottom think he is a monster./ SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 77

programme.desc: SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing! And worst of all, Pat may have been the one that stole it./Rejected yet again by Squidward, SpongeBob decides that if he can't hang with the real Squid, he'll make his own.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts! Timmy makes magic You Doo dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 18

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 4

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 12

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 60

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.desc: Daggett saves cereal box-tops to get a street sweeper. Spawning salmon invade the beavers' lake.
